creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
Thanks for the help testing.

Usually, if an issue occurs on an in-system build from /usr/ports but not in a package built in a poudriere environment, then the issue is likely some port configuration leakage from the environment into the build. So observing that the poudriere build functions like the package build is a good sanity check, but would not reveal any issues.

However, I just re-tested with an updated ports tree and can no longer reproduce the issue. Maybe it has gone away with a recent ECL update. I consider this closed and we can always re-open if it comes back.
